title: fritillaria messanensis subsp. neglecta
intro: Fritillaria messanensis subsp. neglecta, also known as the Chinese gold crown, is a species of flowering plant in the lily family. It is primarily used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and expectorant properties. The plant's health benefits include relieving coughs and respiratory issues, reducing inflammation, and treating various conditions such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Herbal preparations of Fritillaria messanensis subsp. neglecta may be made into teas, tinctures, or dried extracts, which are often combined with other herbs to enhance their effectiveness.
